entries.summary:
Chase Petty impressed in Spring Breakout yesterday 👏

The Reds righthander threw four shutout innings against the Giants with one hit and six Ks.

His slider + sweeper drew four whiffs on nine swings 👀

More top performances from Thursday's games: buff.ly/QEtPXSL
